column1: Which protocol is a combination of PPTP and Layer 2 Forwarding?

column2: Sending a packet from a single source to a single specific destination.

column1: Define 'Multicast' transmission.
column2: Sending a packet from a single source to a specific group of interested destinations.

column1: Define 'Broadcast' transmission.
column2: Sending a packet from a single source to all devices on a local network.
